Container.Name: HELDEVTEST
Container.Overview: HELDEVTEST is an interactive test documentation tool for manual testing workflows. Upload markdown test plans, execute tests interactively, auto-save results, and export professional reports.[br][br] [b]Core Features:[/b][br] [b]✓ Markdown Upload[/b] — Drag & drop .md test plans, automatic structure parsing[br] [b]✓ Interactive Testing[/b] — Checkbox-based UI with Pass/Fail/Skip status, inline bug reporting[br] [b]✓ Auto-Save[/b] — Never lose progress, localStorage + backend sync (500ms debounced)[br] [b]✓ Progress Tracking[/b] — Real-time counters, completion percentage, time tracking[br] [b]✓ Screenshot Support[/b] — Paste from clipboard or upload, embedded in reports[br] [b]✓ Export Options[/b] — Markdown (with results), HTML (shareable), JSON (automation)[br] [b]✓ Templates[/b] — Predefined test plans (Backend API, Frontend UI, Security, Performance)[br][br] [b]Session Recovery:[/b][br] [b]✓ Browser Crash Protection[/b] — Resume from localStorage on refresh[br] [b]✓ Multi-Session Support[/b] — Work on multiple test plans simultaneously[br] [b]✓ Session History[/b] — Review past test executions with full results[br][br] [b]Security:[/b][br] [b]✓ First-Run Setup[/b] — No default passwords, create user account on first access[br] [b]✓ Single-User Auth[/b] — JWT-based authentication, 24h sessions[br] [b]✓ Data Isolation[/b] — All test data stored locally in container[br][br] [b]User Experience:[/b][br] [b]✓ Clean UI[/b] — Professional design, desktop-optimized[br] [b]✓ Real-time Auto-Save[/b] — Visual feedback, never lose work[br] [b]✓ Fast Navigation[/b] — Previous/Next test navigation, section collapse[br][br] [b]First-Time Setup:[/b][br] 1. Install container[br] 2. Access Web UI[br] 3. Create user account (username + password)[br] 4. Upload test plan or select template[br] 5. Start testing[br][br] [b]Use Cases:[/b][br] - Manual QA testing documentation[br] - Bug bounty program test plans[br] - Regression testing workflows[br] - Security audit checklists[br] - Unraid container testing (like HELBACKUP validation)[br][br] [b]Documentation:[/b] https://github.com/Kreuzbube88/heldevtest

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the HELDEVTEST web interface

Config.Name: JWT_SECRET
Config.Description: Required: Random secret for authentication. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
